name_en: Goyard 💕MORVAN Briefcase is lightweight, slim, and practical. Its compact and elegant design makes it an ideal choice for daily and professional use. It features a zip closure system, two round leather handles for comfortable carrying, and an adjustable shoulder strap for shoulder or crossbody wear.
name_cn:
Goyard 💕MORVAN Briefcase is lightweight, slim, and practical. Its compact and elegant design makes it an ideal choice for daily and professional use. It features a zip closure system, two round leather handles for comfortable carrying, and an adjustable shoulder strap for shoulder or crossbody wear.
Size: 39×6.5×29cm
Color: Black
Style: 120247
